name: quickpos
description: Standalone PyQt6 Point-of-Sale (POS) Desktop Application with Web Preview

scripts.dev: node -e "const http = require('http'); http.createServer((req, res) => { res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' }); res.end('Standalone Python PyQt6 POS application. All JS, HTML, and CSS files have been removed per user request.'); }).listen(3000);"
scripts.start: node -e "const http = require('http'); http.createServer((req, res) => { res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' }); res.end('Standalone Python PyQt6 POS application. All JS, HTML, and CSS files have been removed per user request.'); }).listen(3000);"
